loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_amount, ( select nvl(sum(fund_new),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_new where sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as fund_new
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 ) as fund_ret
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no = 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_old
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_50
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_int),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_int_50
, FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type )) as loan_type_description ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_date, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, 'dd/mm/yyyy') as begining_of_contract , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.ending_of_contract ,'DD/MM/YYYY') as ending_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'dd/mm/yyyy') as requestment_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'DD MONTH พ.ศ. YYYY') as thia_begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date, 'dd/mm/yyyy') as start_keep_date, sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
,(select nvl(sum(principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = 0 ) as principal_amount
,(select nvl(sum(interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = 0 ) as interest_amount
,( SELECT nvl(sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ),0) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as item_amount
,nvl((select sc_lon_m_req_fee.prakan_atm from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '17'),0) as prakan_atm_17--ทุนประกัน(17) ,nvl((select sc_lon_m_req_fee.Prakan_Period from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '17'),0) as Prakan_Period_17--คุ้มครอง(ปี)(17) ,nvl((select sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '17'),0) as amount_17 --จำนวนเงิน(17)
,nvl((select sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '20'),0) as amount_20 --จำนวนเงิน(66)
,(select pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_req_fee.deposit_account_no ,'XX-XXXXX-X') from sc_lon_m_req_fee,sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '20' ) as dep_account -- ชื่อบัญชี(66)
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_branch
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and (sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.insure_status = 0
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no

r_mwa_loan_app_by_conno_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code, ( case collateral_type_code when '01' then PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) when '02' then 'ใช้หุ้นค้ำประกัน' when '03' then 'เงินฝากเลขที่ '||ref_own_no else 'ที่ดินเลขที่ '||collateral_description end) as case_collateral_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' )
